help.title: Help Center
help.metaDesc: Buyer and seller guides, FAQs, and support for Todo
help.buyer.q1: How do I search for products or services?
help.buyer.a1: Use the search bar at the top. You can filter by category, type (product, service, digital), city, and price range. You can also browse categories from the home page.
help.buyer.q2: How do I make a purchase?
help.buyer.a2: Find what you're looking for, add it to your cart, and go to Checkout. Fill in your contact details and select your payment method. You'll receive email confirmation and can track your order in My Orders.
help.buyer.a3: It depends on the seller and product type. You can choose store pickup, home delivery, or instant download for digital content. Services can be in-person or remote.
help.buyer.a4: Return policies are set by each seller. If you have an issue with your order, you can open a dispute from My Orders and our team will review it within 48 hours.
help.buyer.q5: How does the review system work?
help.buyer.a5: After each purchase, you can rate the seller and product from 1 to 5 stars. Reviews help other buyers make informed decisions and maintain marketplace quality.
help.seller.q1: How do I start selling on Todo?
help.seller.a1: Create an account and select "I want to sell". Set up your store profile with name, description, logo, and location. Then start creating listings with photos, prices, and descriptions.
help.seller.q2: How much does it cost to sell on Todo?
help.seller.a2: Free Plan: 10% commission per sale. Monthly Plan (COP 49,900/month): 5% commission + unlimited listings + blue verification. Annual Plan (COP 449,900/year): 3% commission + all premium benefits.
help.seller.q3: How do I receive my payments?
help.seller.a3: Payments are processed through Wompi. When a buyer pays, the money is transferred to your Wompi account. You can set up transfers to your Colombian bank account. Payments are available within 1-2 business days.
help.seller.q4: How do I optimize my listings?
help.seller.a4: Use high-quality photos, write detailed descriptions, set competitive prices, and respond quickly to buyer questions. Listings with good reviews rank higher in search results.
help.seller.a5: Verified sellers get a blue trust badge. To get verified, complete your profile 100%, accumulate at least 10 successful sales, maintain a rating above 4.0, and verify your identity with a Colombian ID.
help.payments.a1: We accept credit and debit cards (Visa, Mastercard, American Express), PSE (bank transfer), Nequi, Daviplata, and Efecty (cash payment at physical locations). All payments are securely processed by Wompi.
help.payments.a2: Yes. All payments are processed through Wompi, which complies with the highest PCI DSS security standards. Your financial data is never stored on our servers. Additionally, funds are only released to the seller once you confirm delivery.
help.payments.q3: What if my payment is declined?
help.payments.a3: Check that your card details are correct, you have sufficient funds, and your bank allows online purchases. If the issue persists, contact soporte@todoapp.co and we'll help you resolve it.
help.ai.q1: What can the AI assistant do?
help.ai.a1: Todo's AI assistant can: search for products and services for you, compare prices between sellers, answer questions about orders and shipping, recommend products based on your preferences, and help with any platform questions.
help.ai.q2: Does the AI assistant have access to my information?
help.ai.a2: The assistant only accesses the information needed to help you: your order history, preferences, and location if you authorize it. It has no access to payment data, passwords, or financial information. You can clear your chat history at any time.
help.ai.q3: How much does the AI assistant cost?
help.ai.a3: The AI assistant is free for all users. Seller plans include priority access and advanced features like market analysis and price recommendations.
help.quick.safetyDesc: Wompi-protected payments. Your money is safe until you confirm delivery of the product or service.
help.quick.deliveryDesc: Store pickup, home delivery, instant digital download, or at-home service. You choose.
help.quick.reviewsDesc: Rate your experience after each purchase. Reviews build trust within the community.
help.quick.disputesDesc: If something goes wrong, open a dispute and our team will mediate to find a fair solution within 48h.
help.contact.title: Need personalized help?
help.contact.desc: Our support team is ready to help. We respond in less than 24 hours.

landing.seoTitle: Todo — The Colombian marketplace to buy and sell everything
landing.seoDescription: Buy products, book services, and download digital content in Colombia. Secure Wompi payments, AI assistant, and flexible delivery. Join for free!
landing.hero.subtitle: Buy products, book services, and download digital content. All with secure payments, AI assistant, and flexible delivery across Colombia.
landing.features.title: Everything you need to buy and sell
landing.features.subtitle: A complete platform with smart tools for buyers and sellers.
landing.features.marketplace.title: Complete marketplace
landing.features.marketplace.desc: Physical products, professional services, and digital content. Thousands of local sellers in one place with advanced search and smart filters.
landing.features.ai.title: Intelligent AI assistant
landing.features.ai.desc: An AI-powered assistant that helps you find what you need, compare prices, make recommendations, and answer questions instantly.
landing.features.payments.title: Secure Wompi payments
landing.features.payments.desc: Accept credit/debit cards, PSE, Nequi, Daviplata, and Efecty. Your payments are protected with the highest PCI DSS security standards.
landing.features.analytics.title: Analytics and reports
landing.features.analytics.desc: Dashboard with real-time metrics: sales, visits, conversions, and user behavior. Make data-driven decisions.
landing.features.delivery.title: Flexible delivery
landing.features.delivery.desc: Store pickup, home delivery, instant download, or schedule a service. Multiple delivery options for every product type.
landing.features.local.title: Colombian-local focus
landing.features.local.desc: Designed for the Colombian market. Prices in pesos, local payment methods, Colombian cities, and Spanish-language support.
landing.how.title: Get started in 3 steps
landing.how.subtitle: As easy as creating an account and start buying or selling.
landing.how.step1.title: Create your account
landing.how.step1.desc: Sign up free with your email or Google. Set up your profile in seconds and choose whether you want to buy or sell.
landing.how.step2.title: Explore or publish
landing.how.step2.desc: As a buyer, search through thousands of products. As a seller, publish your listings with photos and prices in minutes.
landing.how.step3.title: Buy, sell, grow
landing.how.step3.desc: Make secure transactions, earn reviews, collect points, and grow your business with our tools.
landing.pricing.title: Plans for every need
landing.pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits you best. Switch at any time.
landing.pricing.plan1.name: Free
landing.pricing.plan2.name: Pro Monthly
landing.pricing.plan3.name: Pro Annual
landing.testimonials.title: What our users say
landing.testimonials.subtitle: Thousands of Colombians already trust Todo to buy and sell.
landing.testimonials.t1.quote: Incredibly easy to use. I listed my handmade crafts in minutes and now I have sales every day. The commission is fair and payments arrive quickly.
landing.testimonials.t1.name: María C.
landing.testimonials.t2.quote: The AI assistant helped me find exactly what I was looking for. I compared prices from 5 different stores without leaving the app. Nequi payments are super easy.
landing.testimonials.t2.name: Juan G.
landing.testimonials.t3.quote: As a freelancer, Todo lets me sell my design services hassle-free. Identity verification builds trust with my clients and the analytics dashboard is great.
landing.testimonials.t3.name: Diana P.
landing.faq.title: Have questions?
landing.faq.a1: Todo is a Colombian marketplace where you can buy physical products, book professional services, and download digital content. You can also sell your own products or services. All with secure payments through Wompi and an AI assistant to help you.
landing.faq.a2: Yes, creating an account and buying is completely free. For sellers, we offer a free plan with up to 10 listings and 10% commission per sale. We also have Pro plans with lower commissions and advanced features.
landing.faq.a3: All payments are processed through Wompi, Colombia's leading payment gateway. We accept credit/debit cards, PSE, Nequi, Daviplata, and Efecty. Funds are held until you confirm delivery to protect both buyer and seller.
landing.faq.q4: Can I sell any type of product?
landing.faq.a4: You can sell physical products, professional services, and digital content. We have content policies that prohibit illegal items, counterfeits, and inappropriate content. Please review our Terms and Conditions for details.
landing.faq.q5: Which cities is Todo available in?
landing.faq.a5: Todo is available throughout Colombia. The main cities with the most activity are Bogotá, Medellín, Cali, Barranquilla, Bucaramanga, and Cartagena. But you can buy and sell from any municipality in the country.
landing.ctaBottom.title: Ready to get started?
landing.ctaBottom.subtitle: Join thousands of Colombians already buying and selling on Todo. Create your free account in seconds.
landing.footer.tagline: The Colombian marketplace where you can buy and sell everything. Products, services, and digital content in one place.
